title: Dense Ores
description: Dense ores for traditional Minecraft ores which drop double the amount of materials!
body:
![Dense Ores Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2878e2fb8d00ad19df422d45ca4b8fdcaa415aa0.png)

**Dense Ores** adds dense variations to all overworld ores which can drop up to three times the amount of materials compared to their normal counterparts. However, these dense ores are much more rarer and in smaller clumps, so keep an eye out!
Dense ores drop more materials and experience and can be mined using Fortune and Silk Touch, which will have their respective effects. There are also dense nether ores as well!
